ruleset.name: orchestrator-pmd-tests
ruleset.description: Test-source PMD guardrails that keep test fixtures maintainable without applying the full production ruleset to tests. Production code is already checked by quality/pmd-rules.xml.

rule.name: UnusedInjectedTestField
rule.message: Injected test field is never used; remove the field or assert the injected collaborator explicitly.
rule.description: PMD's built-in UnusedPrivateField rule intentionally ignores package-private fields. Quarkus tests often use package-private @Inject fields, so this test-only guardrail catches injected fixtures that are declared but never referenced by the test class.

property.name: xpath
